description: Revel in the indulgence of pure leather and look modern and stylish with ease in this pair of tan colour sandals from enroute. Pair it with western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you pack it when you travel. Upper Leather straps across forefoot in a stylish woven pattern and a buckled ankle strap Ergonomically curved footbed for all-day comfort Stitching on midsole to hold shoe together Outsole Durable outsole with light grain effect and a grooved slight TPU heel for absolute grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
